title: Personalization Always-On: Search Results Page
goal: We are introducing a new wave of personalization with enhanced segmentation strategies and use cases that will progressively roll out over the coming months to increase relevance and impact across the user journey. The next step is to implement the successful personalization on the Search Results Page by launching new tests to re-order Popular Categories.
description: We will roll out the successful elements of the personalization test—such as the carousel and category reordering based on users’ visits—while re-testing category ranking based on category affinity and experimenting with different placements of the carousel and categories. We will also refresh the visuals with the new Love Your Journey assets.
